---
title: "Preeclampsia RNA-seq statistical report"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

# Overview

This report summarizes QC, differential expression, enrichment and interaction analyses for the preeclampsia placental RNA-seq project.

# QC

![](../figures/qc/Figure_1_PCA_group_placenta.pdf)

![](../figures/qc/Figure_2_sample_distance_heatmap.pdf)

# Differential expression

DESeq2 results are stored in `results/deseq2/`.

# Enrichment

Hallmark enrichment results are stored in `results/enrichment/`.
